changelog: v3.4.2: Recalibrated CPU benchmark (v8) with 80/20 hot-cold access pattern -- mirrors real game engines and brings CPU-LIMITED composite in line with real Fortnite FPS ratios. Softened score tier labels so mid-tier hardware reads as Good/Great instead of Fair. Removed storage from composites (no effect on steady-state gaming FPS). Fixed Driver Intelligence download button and routed NVIDIA users to NVCleanstall. Added background license revocation for refunded Gumroad keys. Fixed GameInput score check with a Dismiss mechanism. Tightened DRAM latency label thresholds. Hid GPU-LIMITED ring when GPU benchmark is skipped.
